context: Tests whether the agent produces report without modifying files, includes before/after code blocks for fixes, labels fix complexity, and documents the report-only philosophy.

checklist.name: No file modification
checklist.description: Script does NOT modify the input YAML file (statefulset.yaml remains unchanged)

checklist.name: Report file generated
checklist.description: Script creates a separate report file (not stdout-only)

checklist.name: Before/after blocks
checklist.description: Report includes before and after code examples for at least 2 issues

checklist.name: Complexity indicators
checklist.description: Report labels fixes with complexity: [Simple], [Medium], or [Complex]

checklist.name: Philosophy documented
checklist.description: validation-philosophy.md explains why validation should be report-only

checklist.name: Issues identified
checklist.description: Report identifies at least 3 issues (latest tag, string port, plaintext password, missing resources)

checklist.name: Suggested fixes clear
checklist.description: Each suggested fix shows exact replacement code, not just description

checklist.name: Developer workflow
checklist.description: Documentation explains how developers apply fixes after reviewing report
